# BP-20 negative: table-driven loop uses t.Run
lang: go
file: BP-20-safe_test.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "testing"

func TestTableLoop(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []int{1, 2}
	for _, tc := range tests {
		t.Run("case", func(t *testing.T) {
			t.Parallel()
			if tc == 0 {
				t.Fatal("bad")
			}
		})
	}
}
